_publications._publicationTitle: C6 Cell Injection into the Optic Nerve of Long-Evans Rats: A Short-Term Model of Optic Pathway Gliomas.

_contextSnippet: C6 cells were analyzed by flow cytometry using MACSQuantify software... High number of events was observed in all population
details: Successfully analyzed C6 cell phenotype with high number of events observed in all populations using standard gating strategy
